SEARCH
Package au.csiro.pathling.fhirpath

Class TypeInfo

java.lang.Object
au.csiro.pathling.fhirpath.TypeInfo
public class TypeInfo extends Object
Represents type information returned by the FHIRPath type() reflection function. Each instance describes a type with its namespace, name, and base type.
Author:
Piotr Szul
See Also:
  • FHIRPath Reflection

  • Field Details

    • DEFINITION

      @Nonnull public static final ElementDefinition DEFINITION
      Definition for TypeInfo structures returned by the type() reflection function. This defines three string children: namespace, name, and baseType.

  • Constructor Details

    • TypeInfo

      public TypeInfo()

  • Method Details

    • forFhirType

      @Nonnull public static TypeInfo forFhirType(@Nonnull Enumerations.FHIRDefinedType fhirType, boolean isResource)
      Creates a TypeInfo for a FHIR type.
      Parameters:
      fhirType - the FHIR defined type
      isResource - true if the type is a resource type
      Returns:
      a TypeInfo with the FHIR namespace

    • forSystemType

      @Nonnull public static TypeInfo forSystemType(@Nonnull FhirPathType fhirPathType)
      Creates a TypeInfo for a System type.
      Parameters:
      fhirPathType - the FHIRPath type
      Returns:
      a TypeInfo with the System namespace

    • forTypeInfo

      @Nonnull public static TypeInfo forTypeInfo()
      Creates a TypeInfo representing the type of a TypeInfo result itself (System.Object).
      Returns:
      a TypeInfo for System.Object

    • fromCollection

      @Nonnull public static Optional<TypeInfo> fromCollection(@Nonnull Collection input)
      Resolves the TypeInfo for a given collection based on its definition and type information. Returns empty if the type cannot be determined (e.g., for choice or empty collections).
      Parameters:
      input - the input collection
      Returns:
      the resolved TypeInfo, or empty if the type cannot be determined

    • choiceTypeInfoMapper

      @Nonnull public static UnaryOperator<Column> choiceTypeInfoMapper(@Nonnull List<ElementDefinition> choiceTypes)
      Creates a mapper function that transforms a choice element column into a TypeInfo struct column. The mapper inspects which choice field is non-null for each row and returns the corresponding TypeInfo. This enables per-row type resolution for polymorphic choice elements.
      Parameters:
      choiceTypes - the list of possible child element definitions for the choice
      Returns:
      a function that maps an element column to a TypeInfo struct column

    • toStructColumn

      @Nonnull public Column toStructColumn()
      Builds a Spark struct column representing this TypeInfo with namespace, name, and baseType fields.
      Returns:
      a Spark struct column
